title: PGIMER Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 12 Senior Resident and Junior Resident Posts
description: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has announced the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 12 Senior Resident and Junior Resident Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the MBBS can grab this chance and apply for the PGIMER Notification 2026 . Here we provided more details about the age limit, selection process, salarystructure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
